zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland於1270年8月10日出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾爾德斯利時，他的父親Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie21歲，母親Margaret de Crawford19歲。他和Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute至少有3個女兒。他於1297年登記服兵役。他於1297年在蘇格蘭被列為guardian of scotland。他去世於1305年8月23日在英國英格蘭倫敦斯米費爾德享年35歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪笛卡爾 阿爾迪。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland was born on 10 August 1270, in Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, was 21 and his mother, Margaret de Crawford, was 19. He had at least 3 daughters with Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute. He registered for military service in 1297. In 1297, his occupation is listed as guardian of scotland in Scotland. He died on 23 August 1305, in Smithfield, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35, and was buried in Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland est né le 10 août 1270, à Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Crawford, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. En 1297, sa profession de son indiquée est guardian of scotland à Écosse. Il est décédé le 23 août 1305, à Smithfield, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Old Machar Churchyard Old Aberdeen, Aber: Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland am 10. August 1270 in Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie 21 und seine Mutter Margaret de Crawford 19. Er hatte mit Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute mindestens 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1297 ist sein Beruf als guardian of scotland in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 23. August 1305 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Smithfield, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland è nato il il 10 agosto 1270 nel Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Crawford, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Nel 1297, la sua occupazione è indicata come guardian of scotland nel Scotland. Morì il 23 agosto 1305, nel Smithfield, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotlandが1270年8月10日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアエルダースリーで生まれた時，父Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslieは21歳，母Margaret de Crawfordは19歳であった。彼はLady Marion Cornellia Braidfuteとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。1297年，スコットランドでの職業はguardian of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1305年8月23日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスミスフィールドで35歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアアバーディーンオルド アバーディーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland(이)가 1270년 8월 10일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 엘더슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Crawford(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1297년, 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 guardian of scotland이었다. 그는 1305년 8월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스미스필드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 압르디 드 압르디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1270, em Elderslie, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Crawford, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Em 1297, sua profissão aparece como guardian of scotland em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1305, em Smithfield, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Old Machar Churchyard Old Aberdeen, Aber: олд абирдин, абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Wallace Guardian of Scotland родился 10 августа 1270 г. в местности элдирсли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Malcolm “Alan” Wallace Ist Laird of Elderslie было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Crawford, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1297 годуработал по профессии guardian of scotland в местности Шотландия. Он умер 23 августа 1305 г. в местности смитфиелд, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности олд абирдин, абирдин, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Lady Marion Cornellia Braidfute. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. En 1297, su ocupación registrada era guardian of scotland en Scotland. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1305, en Smithfield, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Old Aberdeen, Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
